_note: Reference checks for the Vedic layer, each citing the named authority and convention it follows. Sourced from BPHS (Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra) and, where a convention has variants, the PyJHora implementation (which follows PVR Narasimha Rao's Integrated Approach). Committed for reproducibility, like the Horizons cache; validate_jyotish.py replays them. Grows as deferred techniques land.

checks.source: BPHS: 27 nakshatras of 13deg20', Ashwini ruled by Ketu
BPHS nakshatra division
BPHS nakshatra division
BPHS Vimshottari: Ashwini -> Ketu mahadasha
BPHS Vimshottari: Rohini -> Moon mahadasha
Yogini dasha add-3 rule: (1 + 3) mod 8 = 4 -> Bhramari
BPHS navamsa: movable sign from itself
BPHS navamsa: fixed/earth sign from Capricorn
BPHS navamsa: 9th navamsa of Aries
BPHS drekkana: 2nd drekkana = 5th sign
BPHS dasamsa: even sign from the 9th
BPHS Parashari hora: odd sign first half -> Sun's hora (Leo)
BPHS Parashari hora: even sign first half -> Moon's hora (Cancer)
BPHS trimsamsa: odd sign 10-18deg ruled by Jupiter
BPHS trimsamsa: even sign 5-12deg ruled by Mercury
BPHS Pancha Mahapurusha: Mars in own sign in a kendra
BPHS: Jupiter in a kendra from the Moon
BPHS Kemadruma: no graha in the 2nd/12th from, or with, the Moon
BPHS Kemadruma: a graha in the 2nd from the Moon cancels it
PyJHora/PVR Rao Ashtottari: Punarvasu group -> Sun
PyJHora/PVR Rao Ashtottari: Rahu group wraps to Ashwini
BPHS graha drishti: Mars aspects the 4th
BPHS graha drishti: Jupiter aspects the 9th
BPHS: Saturn is the yogakaraka for Taurus lagna (rules the 9th and 10th)
BPHS raja yoga: kendra lord (4th=Moon) conjunct trikona lord (5th=Sun)
